edge_hypothesis: The MACD ACCEPT (PF=1.347, 189 trades) uses 3.5x ATR TP — harvesting moderate moves. But the advisory specifically flags 'extreme R:R variants (TP=10.0x, R:R=5:1) for tail-heavy distribution viability' as untested. The MACD histogram zero-cross is the system's highest-quality signal: it catches the exact moment momentum shifts direction, confirmed by close vs EMA_50. On ETH/4h, momentum shifts occasionally ignite 5-15% multi-day moves. By pushing TP to 6-10x ATR with 2.0x stops, we transform from 'consistent small wins' (the ACCEPT's profile) to 'rare big wins' (tail harvesting). The math: at 4:1 R:R, even 25% win rate produces PF>1.3. The EMA_50 confirmation already filters noise signals, so effective win rate should exceed 25%. This is a fundamentally different trading philosophy from the ACCEPT — same signal, radically different exit. If it works, the system has two complementary deployment modes for the same signal. Regime assumption: TRENDING (tail moves require sustained directional momentum). Invalidation: if win rate drops below 15% at 8x TP, tail events are too rare on 4h ETH to harvest — consider 1h timeframe for more opportunities.

variants.name: macd_tail_harvester_moderate
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-cross with 2.0x ATR stop / 6.0x ATR TP (3:1 R:R). This is the conservative tail-harvesting variant — pushing TP 70% beyond the ACCEPT's 3.5x to capture larger moves without going extreme. Requires only 25% win rate for breakeven. Tests whether MACD signals that hit 3.5x TP frequently go on to hit 6.0x — if so, the ACCEPT is leaving money on the table.
entry_long: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (bullish momentum shift).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (bearish momentum shift).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (6.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis test: if win rate > 30% at 6.0x TP, the ACCEPT's 3.5x is suboptimal
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 6.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross — system's highest quality signal, proven PF=1.347
EMA_50 trend confirmation — filters noise signals
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 6.0x TP — conservative tail harvesting R:R

variants.name: macd_tail_harvester_extreme
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-cross with 2.0x ATR stop / 8.0x ATR TP (4:1 R:R). This is the full tail-harvesting variant — 2.3x the ACCEPT's TP. Tests whether MACD zero-crosses catch the starts of major ETH moves (5%+ on 4h). At 4:1 R:R, only 20% win rate is needed for breakeven. The key question: does the MACD signal quality (EMA_50 confirmed histogram cross) produce enough directional accuracy that 1 in 5 trades runs to 8x ATR? If yes, this is a more capital-efficient deployment than the ACCEPT.
entry_long: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (bullish momentum shift).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (bearish momentum shift).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (8.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis test: if win rate < 15%, 8x TP is too extreme for 4h ETH — try 1h
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 8.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-cross — targeting tail events from the proven signal
EMA_50 trend confirmation — critical filter for tail quality
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 8.0x TP — full tail harvesting at 4:1 R:R

variants.name: macd_tail_harvester_max
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-cross with 2.0x ATR stop / 10.0x ATR TP (5:1 R:R). The maximum tail-harvesting variant — exactly what the advisory flagged as untested. Only needs 17% win rate for breakeven. This pushes the question to its limit: on ETH/4h, how often does a MACD zero-cross precede a move of 10x ATR (roughly 4-7% on typical ETH/4h volatility)? If this produces PF > 1.0, it proves that extreme patience with the best signal pays. If PF < 0.8, tails are definitively too rare on 4h and the tail-harvesting thesis is invalidated.
entry_long: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (bullish momentum shift).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACD histogram (MACDh_12_26_9) crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (bearish momentum shift).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.

exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Definitive tail-harvesting test: if PF < 0.8 at 5:1 R:R, thesis is invalidated for 4h
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.
